case_title: COHEN, STEPHEN DDS, APDC et al VS ROUZMEHR, PARI

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ROUZMEHR, PARI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT COHEN, STEPHEN  DDS, APDC WONG, SHANNON   DDS, APDC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $232.77 FILED BY COHEN, STEPHEN  DDS, APDC WONG, SHANNON   DDS, APDC AS TO DEFENDANT ROUZMEHR, PARI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROUZMEHR, PARI
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,800.50 FILED BY ROUZMEHR, PARI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT COHEN, STEPHEN  DDS, APDC WONG, SHANNON   DDS, APDC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN, STEPHEN  DDS, APDC WONG, SHANNON   DDS, APDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUZMEHR, PARI $232.77 PRINCIPAL, $23.27 INTEREST, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $311.04 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
